title: AdapterArtifact v1
description: Machine-readable schema for adapter-first specialization artifacts and their deployment-facing provenance.

adapter/id.description: Stable identifier of the adapter artifact.

job/id.description: TrainingJob identifier that produced the adapter.

base-model/ref.description: Immutable base model on top of which the adapter applies.

adapter/hash.description: Hash or equivalent immutable content identifier of the adapter payload.

eval-report/ref.description: Reference to evaluation results that justify deployment or rejection.

deployment/scope.description: Intended deployment visibility of the adapter artifact.

rollback/ref.description: Reference to rollback path, previous adapter, or disable artifact.

creator/refs.description: Creators or contributors that should remain attributable in downstream use.

model-card/ref.description: Reference to model card or equivalent manifest describing intended use and risks.

policy_annotations.description: Optional implementation-local annotations that do not change the core adapter semantics.
